mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projects, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_projects, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as archived_projects, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 AND end_time < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delayed_projects FROM project_manage_info WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_start_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_progress_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 4, 6) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delayed_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paused_tasks FROM project_manage_wbs WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND project_id = #{projectId}
